properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: Champion NERDS is not unlocked with this skin. NERDS can only be unlocked by purchasing them in the Gem Shop.

class.original: Fighter / Ranger / Bard / Cleric / Rogue / Wizard
class.display: 战士 / 巡林客 / 吟游诗人 / 牧师 / 游荡者 / 法师

backstory.original: A spontaneous fighter, a creative ranger, and a daring rogue team up with a humorous bard, a deep-thinking wizard, and a logical cleric. Together, they form a sweet partnership! Each NERD has a role, but like all adventuring parties, they're better together!
backstory.display: 一位自然而然的战士，一位有创意的巡林客，一位果敢的盗贼与滑稽的吟游诗人、深思熟虑的法师和有条有理的牧师所组成的队伍。他们一起组建了甜蜜的伙伴关系！每个呆宝都有自己的角色，但就像所有的冒险团队一样，他们在一起的时候更厉害！

description.original: Leaps out of the cart and hits the nearest enemy with their shield.
description.display: 跳下车，并用盾牌攻击最近的敌人。

description.original: The NERDS dive into their cart and a random assortment of NERDS leap out to replace them.
description.display: 呆宝们跳进他们的马车，一群呆宝随机跳出来代替他们。

longDescription.original: The nerds dive into their cart causing it to shake and a random assortment of nerds leap out to replace them. If a specialization is chosen, the front-nerd will always be the nerd picked by the specialization.
longDescription.display: 呆宝们跳进他们的马车，导致马车摇晃，一群呆宝随机跳出来代替他们。如果选择了某个专精，那么该专精挑选的呆宝将始终处于最前面。

description.desc: Increase the damage of all Champions behind the NERDS by $(amount)% when enemies are attacking the NERDS while the {Fighter}#ed8730 is active.
激活“{Fighter}#ed8730”时，每当有敌人攻击呆宝们，使呆宝们身后的所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: When the fighter is active and enemies are attacking the NERDS buff the Champions behind them.
tipText.display: 当战士处于活动状态，敌人正在攻击呆宝们时，会使他们后面的勇士们变强壮。

description.desc: When the NERDS attack while the {Ranger}#e50035 is active, damaged enemies take $(amount)% more damage for the next 15 seconds.
激活“{Ranger}#e50035”时，每当呆宝们发动攻击，受到伤害的敌人在接下来的 15 秒内受到的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Enemies attacked by the NERDS while the ranger is active take more damage from other champions too.
tipText.display: 巡林客活跃时被呆宝们攻击的敌人也会受到其他勇士的更多伤害。

description.desc: Increases the damage of Champions adjacent to the NERDS by $(amount)% while the {Bard}#6ac359 is active.
激活“{Bard}#6ac359”时，使与呆宝们相邻的勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。
Heals all Champions in all columns in front of the NERDS for $(amount) HP per second while the {Cleric}#f8e432 is active.
激活“{Cleric}#f8e432”时，每秒为呆宝们前方各列的所有勇士治疗 $(amount) 点生命值。

When the NERDS attack while the {Rogue}#e035aa is active, they leave behind a small NERD-shaped trap filled with smoke powder which explodes after 5 seconds, dealing 10x the NERDS' normal damage. The NERDS also attack 0.5 seconds faster while the {Rogue}#e035aa is active.
激活“{Rogue}#e035aa”时，每当呆宝们发动攻击，他们会留下一个装满烟粉的呆宝们形状小陷阱，陷阱将在 5 秒后爆炸，造成等同于呆宝们基础伤害 10 倍的伤害。激活“{Rogue}#e035aa”时，呆宝们的攻击速度还会加快 0.5 秒。
When the NERDS attack while the {Wizard}#856fd3 is active, their initial attack spawns 3 magic missiles, which fly out and deal normal damage to 3 random enemies if possible.
激活“{Wizard}#856fd3”时，每当呆宝们发动攻击，他们的初始攻击会生成 3 发魔法飞弹，飞出后最多对 3 名随机敌人造成基础伤害。
When the {Fighter}#ed8730 is active, the max health of the NERDS is increased by $(amount)%.
激活“{Fighter}#ed8730”时，呆宝们的最大生命值提高 $(amount)%。
The {Fighter}#ed8730 will always appear in the front of the cart when Shake The Box is used.
使用“摇摇盒子”后，“{Fighter}#ed8730”总是会出现在购物车的最前面。

specializationDescription.original: The NERDS choose Orange to lead!

description.desc: The {Ranger}#e50035 will always appear in the front of the cart when Shake The Box is used.
使用“摇摇盒子”后，“{Ranger}#e50035”总是会出现在购物车的最前面。

specializationDescription.original: The NERDS choose Red to lead!

description.desc: The {Bard}#6ac359 will always appear in the front of the cart when Shake The Box is used.
使用“摇摇盒子”后，“{Bard}#6ac359”总是会出现在购物车的最前面。

specializationDescription.original: The NERDS choose Green to lead!

description.desc: The {Cleric}#f8e432 will always appear in the front of the cart when Shake The Box is used.
使用“摇摇盒子”后，“{Cleric}#f8e432”总是会出现在购物车的最前面。

specializationDescription.original: The NERDS choose Yellow to lead!

description.desc: The {Rogue}#e035aa will always appear in the front of the cart when Shake The Box is used.
使用“摇摇盒子”后，“{Rogue}#e035aa”总是会出现在购物车的最前面。

specializationDescription.original: The NERDS choose Pink to lead!

description.desc: The {Wizard}#856fd3 will always appear in the front of the cart when Shake The Box is used.
使用“摇摇盒子”后，“{Wizard}#856fd3”总是会出现在购物车的最前面。

specializationDescription.original: The NERDS choose Purple to lead!

description.original: Gather your party and do your best!
description.display: 召集你的队伍，使出全力来吧！

description.original: Adventure together on an epic quest!
description.display: 一起冒险，踏上史诗征程吧！

description.original: Rangers are warriors of the wilderness.
A bards' musical songs inspire allies and can turn foes into friends!
description.display: 吟游诗人的乐曲能鼓舞队友，也能将敌人变成朋友！

description.original: Clerics channel divine healing magic that can defend their allies.
description.display: 牧师引导神圣的治疗魔法来守护他们的同伴。

description.original: You don't always have a healing potion available!
description.display: 治疗药剂可不是什么时候都常备的！

description.original: For when it's been a while since your last long rest.
description.display: 你已经很长时间没好好休息过了。
